text.title: Freelance Referral Program Design Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: solo consultant launches Q2 referral program.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo dev with 4 past clients + 3 peers wants a formal referral program. Standard offering $5000. Accountant approves $500 flat-cash incentive.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "program_id": "frp-2026q2", "incentive": {"type": "flat_cash", "amount_usd": 500}, "attribution_window_days": 90, "referrers": [{"handle": "@past-client-acme", "written_terms_date": "2026-05-10"}], "partners": [{"handle": "@peer-marina", "swap_opt_in_date": "2026-05-12"}], "testimonial_framing": {"template": "Acme used <NICHE> to ship in 2 weeks vs 3 months estimated.", "approved_by_customers": ["Acme"]}, "owner": "@ruslan" }

list.item: Written terms with date — rule written-incentive-per-referrer.
Testimonial template + named customer approvals — rule nda-safe-testimonial-framing.
